title: Languages registry
description: The single list of display languages the app knows about. The language picker shows 'available' languages other than the English fallback; adding a language means adding one locale file (all keys, key-parity enforced) and one entry here — app code never changes.

tag.description: BCP-47 language tag: language, optional region, optional private-use variant (e.g. 'ar', 'vi-VN', 'zh-TW', 'vi-VN-x-north').

endonym.description: The language's own name in that language (e.g. 'Tiếng Việt'). For a dialect, this is the BASE language name; variantLabel names the dialect.

base.description: Group key for dialects of one language (e.g. 'vi' groups Southern and Northern Vietnamese). Omit for a standalone language (it forms its own group).

variantLabel.description: The dialect's own name within its base group (e.g. 'Miền Nam' / 'Miền Bắc'). Present only for grouped dialects.

direction.description: Text direction; 'rtl' for Arabic, Farsi, Urdu, Hebrew. Defaults to 'ltr'.
